_help.privacy_mode: raw = verbatim | redact_pii = mask PII (default) | hashed = store only a hash prefix, no text | metadata_only = no text or hash
_help.store_raw_prompts: must also be true for privacy_mode 'raw' to take effect
_help.auto_observe: true = the UserPromptSubmit hook coaches every prompt; false = manual /analyze-prompt only. Prefix any prompt with * to skip once.
_help.coach_one_habit_at_a_time: true = headline a single focus habit per prompt instead of listing every flaw
